displayTitle: Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures
synopsis: Even with less than twenty minutes of "screen time" to his credit, the most popular character from the Star Wars trilogy is Boba Fett. Dark Horse offers a number of comics featuring the merciless bounty hunter, but it all starts here, in this collection of Russ Manning's *Star Wars* newspaper strips. It was in these strips, which originally ran in 1979 and 1980, that Boba Fett made his very first appearance in print. The artwork has been colored, reformatted, and expertly retouched by Rick Hoberg, who worked with Manning on the original strips.
title: Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures
